Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was shown to a spacious room where[n]I could enjoy solo karaoke to the fullest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sang many songs with all my heart...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone outside the room was looking[n]at me, but I sang loudly without a care...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A waiter came into the room, but[n]I continued to sing wholeheartedly...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} has gone up[n]from not caring what other people think...[n]{f 1 1}
